title: Investigation, RED capture, line-scanner emit-category audit

commits_since_planning: c86d701 feat(taint): Ruby subshell ShellExec dispatch arm (ruby-backtick-extraction-v1 M2)
b577796 feat(taint): nested-constructor descent in extract_first_identifier_arg_ast (var-extract-nested-constructor-v1)
baseline_drift_check.drift_significance: Both commits closed sibling carry-forwards (Ruby subshell dispatch + nested-constructor descent in C++/Java/Scala deserialization). Neither modifies vuln.rs:354-419 (analyze_file) nor RUST_AST_SINKS HttpRequest at taint.rs:2464-2477. M2 dispatch-flip + dedupe + SSRF bank patch surface is unaffected. Baseline GREEN count at planning was 158/166 on a 166-fixture corpus; HEAD baseline is 163/168 on a 168-fixture corpus (+2 fixtures from sibling-milestone fixture additions; +5 GREEN: +3 nested-constructor closures, +1 Ruby closure, +1 net new GREEN from the fixture-set delta). M2 expected post-merge GREEN target: 163 + 4 = 167/168.

out_of_scope_red_at_head: cpp_deserialization_positive (Bucket B; closes in var-extract-nested-constructor-v1 follow-on; not addressed by this milestone)

rust_ssrf_positive.verdict: canonical pipeline detects source (env_var) but SINK BANK GAP — reqwest::blocking::get not in RUST_AST_SINKS HttpRequest member_patterns at taint.rs:2464-2477; M2 SSRF bank patch closes this

rust_command_injection_positive.rationale: early-return at vuln.rs:368-370 routes .rs to analyze_rust_file; line scanner emits 0 because string-literal guard at vuln.rs:603-604 (`!trimmed.contains(".arg(\"")`) traps `.arg("-c").arg(&cmd)` on the same line

rust_path_traversal_positive.rationale: early-return; no line-scanner trigger (no Command::new, format!, transmute, ptr::, unsafe, .unwrap suppressed by is_rust_test_file '/tests/' check)

rust_command_injection_string_literal_fp.rationale: early-return; no line-scanner trigger (regression-guard baseline GREEN)

trigger_patterns.title: Potential Panic From unwrap()
trigger_patterns.is_rust_test_file_suppression_note: is_rust_test_file at vuln.rs:679-685 returns true for paths containing /tests/, \\tests\\, _test.rs, tests.rs. The 4 RED fixtures live under crates/tldr-cli/tests/fixtures/ — Panic emission is suppressed for fixture analysis. On user codebases (typical paths like crates/foo/src/main.rs, src/lib.rs), Panic fires per .unwrap(). Pre-existing carry-forward (premortem dab0766 R2 sub-elephant E3); out of M2 scope.

trigger_patterns.title: SQL String Interpolation
trigger_patterns.OVERLAP_WITH_CANONICAL: Canonical pipeline ALSO emits SqlInjection. Dedupe target on (line, vuln_type) match — see M2 dedupe_overlap helper.

trigger_patterns.title: Unsanitized Process Argument
trigger_patterns.OVERLAP_WITH_CANONICAL: Canonical pipeline ALSO emits CommandInjection. Dedupe target on (line, vuln_type) match.

ssrf_bank_audit.gap: ("", "reqwest::blocking::get") missing — confirmed empirically: rust_ssrf_positive.rs uses `reqwest::blocking::get(&u)`, taint pipeline reports sources=2, sinks=0, flows=0
ssrf_bank_audit.extract_call_name_rust_shape_for_reqwest: scoped_identifier with text 'reqwest::blocking::get' — extract_call_name_rust at ast_utils.rs:688-700 returns Some("reqwest::blocking::get") (the full text of the call_expression's `function` field). Raw-fallback shape ("", "reqwest::blocking::get") in member_patterns_match at taint.rs:3913-3917 matches via descendant_text.contains(pat_field). Same shape as existing reqwest::get / Url::parse / hyper::Client entries.
